channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260317.1)
item.description:
What's New

feat: event-driven overlay detection with probe arming

Replace polling-based overlay detection with an event-driven probe

mechanism for O(1) steady-state performance:

  • Add armProbe() / armProbeDeferred() to OverlayAppDetector for

explicit probe lifecycle management

  • Cache overlay state for instant reads; only perform AX queries

when a probe is armed by external signals (modifier keys, Esc,

Return, mouse clicks)

  • armProbeDeferred() adds 50ms delay for close signals (Esc/Return)

to let the overlay process the key and dismiss before probing

  • Add probe timeout safety net (0.8s) to auto-disarm stale probes

Cleanup:

  • Remove detectOverlayApps setting and UI toggle (always enabled)
  • Remove unused getAppBundleIdFromElement/getFocusedElementAppBundleId
  • Simplify KeyboardEventHandler overlay check flow
  • Update StatusBarViewModel overlay state display to use cached values

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
